name: Smart Retail POS System
description: Developing a full-featured POS system tailored for small retail and multi-category stores including groceries, clothing, and toys
Designed an offline-first architecture using LiteDB and SQLite for reliable local data storage without internet dependency
Implemented real-time billing system with WebSocket integration for instant transaction updates
Built inventory management with stock tracking, low-stock alerts, and category organization
Developed responsive UI using Angular with service-based state management for smooth user experience
Designed backend services using .NET Core with efficient local database operations for high performance
Planning features like GST billing, reporting dashboards, and multi-user role management

name: Modern Developer Portfolio
description: Designed and developed a modern, responsive developer portfolio to showcase projects and professional experience
Implemented reusable UI components with Angular and Tailwind CSS for scalable and maintainable design
Integrated smooth animations and scroll-based reveal effects to enhance user experience
Optimized performance using lazy loading and efficient rendering techniques
Structured project data dynamically using JSON for easy scalability and content management

name: Titan (NeoCore) - Vital Monitoring System
description: Contributed to NeoCore, a next-generation cross-platform medical system replacing legacy solutions for real-time patient vital monitoring and therapy management
Designed and developed a Vital Alarm Service enabling reliable real-time alerts for critical patient conditions
Built a centralized Notification Center and Alert Logs to improve traceability, reminders, and auditability for healthcare workflows
Implemented multi-language (NLS) support across 5+ languages, enhancing global accessibility
Established SSIT environment and developed SITA automation framework, reducing manual testing effort by 40%
Developed scalable backend services using .NET Core with REST APIs and WebSockets for real-time communication
Built responsive and performant frontend using Angular with state management (NgRx)

name: Sensis - Vital Monitoring System
description: Contributed to Sensis, a real-time patient vital monitoring system in the healthcare domain
Developed a log analysis system processing 10,000+ logs per day, improving checklist reliability and ensuring zero exposure of sensitive patient data
Built a document-to-API mapping tool that reduced smoke test execution time and errors by 50% across 100+ daily test cases
Collaborated across Development and QA teams, managing 50+ tasks across agile sprints
Worked on backend development using .NET Core, EF Core, and SQL Server with deployment support on Azure
